news.t: Global X Launches PureCap[SM] Product Suite to Provide Uncapped Sector ETF Exposure

holdings.infoBox: GXPC is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 33.10%, Alphabet at 26.15%, Meta Platforms at 19.47%, Netflix at 5.06%, and Verizon Communications at 2.99%.

overview.description: The Global X PureCap MSCI Communication Services ETF (GXPC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Communication Services index. The fund selects US companies involved in the Communication Services sector. Holdings are weighted purely by market capitalization without maximum weight constraints. GXPC was launched on Jul 22, 2025 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Global X Launches PureCap[SM] Product Suite to Provide Uncapped Sector ETF Exposure
data.text: The new suite of ETFs seeks to deliver true market capitalization exposure across five key sectors, addressing rising market concentration trends NEW YORK , July 23, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Global X Mana...
